---
title: "Protocols"
---

## Summary
All standard laboratory protocols used in this lab Notebook and the Avian Disease Ecology Lab at University of Rhode Island. All links lead to file in github repository

-   [Tri-Reagent/Direct-zol RNA Isolation Protocol](https://github.com/JAHarvey/RNA-Blood-preservation-extraction/blob/main/RNA_Isolation_Protocol.mkd)
-   [gDNA Extraction Protocol](https://github.com/AppleBCN/Lab-Notebook/blob/main/Niel%20Bauer%20Lab%20Notebook/Turkey%20DNA%20extraction.qmd)
